assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 33-38 contain a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section that explicitly extracts from the Source Repositories table: 'Source Repositories table entry: rhtpa-backend | https://github.com/rhtpa/rhtpa-backend | /home/dev/repos/rhtpa-backend | customer-shipped' and records 'Deployment context: customer-shipped'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 35-37: 'Affected repository: rhtpa-backend (matched from component label pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server)', 'Source Repositories table entry: rhtpa-backend | ... | customer-shipped', 'Deployment context: customer-shipped'. Line 39 confirms it will be used downstream: 'This deployment context will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance in remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md contains '### Coordination Guidance' subsections nested under '## Implementation Notes' in all four remediation tasks: Task 1 (line 52), Task 2 (line 104), Preemptive Task 3 (line 175), and Preemptive Task 4 (line 233). Each contains customer-shipped guidance text: 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 54 (and repeated at lines 106, 176, 235): 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' All three elements (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned.
